ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "api" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the well */,
  "spud_date" TEXT /* Date when drilling started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the well */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., Oil and gas) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the well */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the well */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the well is located */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the well */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last inspection */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "well_permits" TEXT /* Permits associated with the well */,
  "well_type_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the well type */,
  "well_status_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the well status */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_operator FOREIGN KEY ("operator") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the operator */,
  "regulatory_compliance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the operator is in compliance with regulations */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the owner */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (individual, corporate, etc.) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "api" TEXT /* API of the well */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership began */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ended */,
  "percentage_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for changes in ownership percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_ownership_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES well_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_ownership_api FOREIGN KEY ("api") REFERENCES wells ("api")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "api" TEXT /* API of the well */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_file" TEXT /* File path to the contract document */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (active, expired, etc.) */,
  "contract_type_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the contract type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_api FOREIGN KEY ("api") REFERENCES wells ("api")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "api" TEXT /* API of the well */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "oil_volume" REAL /* Volume of oil produced */,
  "gas_volume" REAL /* Volume of gas produced */,
  "water_volume" REAL /* Volume of water produced */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* Method of production (e.g., conventional, enhanced recovery) */,
  "production_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of production */,
  "production_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_api FOREIGN KEY ("api") REFERENCES wells ("api")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "api" TEXT /* API of the well */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (completed, pending, etc.) */,
  "maintenance_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_api FOREIGN KEY ("api") REFERENCES wells ("api")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, geologist, executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "api" TEXT /* API of the well */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the well data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the well data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_api FOREIGN KEY ("api") REFERENCES wells ("api"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing oil and gas operations */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the state */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the regulatory body */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the regulatory body */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_states" (
  "well_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well-state association */,
  "api" TEXT /* API of the well */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the well is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_states_api FOREIGN KEY ("api") REFERENCES wells ("api"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_states_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "api" TEXT /* API of the well */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the well information */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_versions_api FOREIGN KEY ("api") REFERENCES wells ("api")
)
